title: Register with valid email format containing '@' and domain
preconditions: User is on the registration page
No existing account with email 'valid.user@example.com'
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully
The system sends a verification email to 'valid.user@example.com'
A success message is displayed indicating registration is complete and verification email has been sent

title: Register with email missing '@'
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the email field indicating the email format is invalid (e.g., 'Email must contain @')

title: Register with email missing domain
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the email field indicating the email format is invalid (e.g., 'Email must contain a domain after @')

title: Register with duplicate email
preconditions: User is on the registration page
An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
expected_results: The system does not create a new user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the email field indicating the email is already registered (e.g., 'This email is already registered')

title: Register with password length exactly 8 characters
preconditions: User is on the registration page
No existing account with email 'boundary8@example.com'
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully
The system sends a verification email to 'boundary8@example.com'

title: Register with password length exactly 12 characters
preconditions: User is on the registration page
No existing account with email 'boundary12@example.com'
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully
The system sends a verification email to 'boundary12@example.com'

title: Register with password length 7 characters
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the password field indicating the password must be between 8 and 12 characters (e.g., 'Password must be between 8 and 12 characters')

title: Register with password length 13 characters
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the password field indicating the password must be between 8 and 12 characters (e.g., 'Password must be between 8 and 12 characters')

title: Register with password missing uppercase letter
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
An error message is displayed indicating the password must contain at least one uppercase letter

title: Register with password missing lowercase letter
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
An error message is displayed indicating the password must contain at least one lowercase letter

title: Register with password missing digit
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
An error message is displayed indicating the password must contain at least one digit

title: Register with password missing special character
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
An error message is displayed indicating the password must contain at least one special character from the allowed set

title: Register with password containing consecutive spaces
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
An error message is displayed indicating consecutive spaces are not allowed in the password

title: Register with password having leading spaces
preconditions: User is on the registration page
No existing account with email 'leadingspace@example.com'
test_steps: Enter ' Abc@123' in the password field
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully because the password with leading spaces meets all other rules
The system sends a verification email to 'leadingspace@example.com'

title: Register with password having trailing spaces
preconditions: User is on the registration page
No existing account with email 'trailingspace@example.com'
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully because the password with trailing spaces meets all other rules
The system sends a verification email to 'trailingspace@example.com'

title: Register with password containing email prefix
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
An error message is displayed indicating the password cannot contain the email prefix

title: Verify error message for duplicate email
preconditions: User is on the registration page
An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
expected_results: The system does not create a new user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the email field, such as 'This email is already registered' or 'Email already exists'

preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the email field, such as 'Please enter a valid email address' or 'Invalid email format'

title: Verify error message for invalid password length
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the password field, such as 'Password must be between 8 and 12 characters'

title: Register with password length 8 characters but missing required character types

expected_results: The system does not create the user account

title: Register with password containing email prefix in different case

expected_results: The system does not create the user account

title: Register with email containing spaces

test_steps: Enter 'user name@example.com' in the email field
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
